reviews.comment:
Un lugar con buena atención del ACA.
Se encuentre cerca de la ruta.
En el servicio de compras NO tiene Mercadopago o YPF serviclub.

A location with good service from the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).
It's located near the highway. The service station does not accept MercadoPago or YPF Serviclub.
